CustomField.description: Indicates that the payment stream on this schedule is booked as rental or not. If checked then payment stream on this schedule is booked as ad-hoc and category on the invoice will be set as 'Ad-Hoc'.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Indicates that the payment stream on this schedule is booked as rental or not. If checked then payment stream on this schedule is booked as ad-hoc and category on the invoice will be set as 'Ad-Hoc'.
CustomField.label: Ad hoc Schedule
